Happy 25th Birthday
Mine Majidh

To the man who waited for me,
who never stopped believing in us.

🎉

• SWIPE OR TAP ARROWS •

OUR STORY

🌱
16 and 17 years old
Where it all began
School best friends who fell in love. Pure, young and real. You were already my Majidh, even back then.
⏳
10 long years
You waited for me
I walked away and hurt you more than you deserved. But you waited, baby. That kind of love only exists in very few people in this world.
📱
The day everything changed
I found you again on Facebook
I saw your face on a friend's post and my heart stopped. I sent a request with shaking hands. We talked and all those years melted away.
💍
20th May 2026
I proposed to you
This time it was me. I was not going to lose you again. You waited long enough, so I said it first, and I meant every word.
🤝
24th June 2026
You proposed back
You took time to trust again, and then you chose me officially. The day you became mine and I became yours. Forever.

OUR TIME TOGETHER

Every minute with you feels like home, Majidh.

🗣

Long talks that never feel long enough

🚲

Rides where I just want the road to never end

😂

Jokes that make me laugh way too hard

🍔

Sharing food off the same plate, always

💤

Falling asleep with you right beside me, safe and warm

WHY I LOVE YOU

⏳

YOU WAITED

No one in this world would wait that long. That patience tells me everything about who you are.

🤞

YOU FORGAVE

You knew everything and still chose me. You just trusted. That is the most beautiful thing.

☀️

GOOD MORNINGS

Without fail your first thought is me. Every message makes me feel loved all over again.

🙂

YOUR SMILE

The way you look at me makes the whole world quiet. My favourite thing on earth.

🤷

HOW YOU LOVE

You respect my Amma, love your family, care for children. You are genuinely good, baby.

💼

YOUR DRIVE

Future CEO. Some dreams you let go for me. I will never forget that, Majidh.

😂

YOU MAKE ME LAUGH

So funny without even trying. You bring such joy and lightness into my life always.

🥊

YOU GIVE ME PEACE

Every day happy and peaceful. I did not know love could feel this calm until you.

25 WISHES FOR 25 YEARS

01May every day of your 25th year be filled with the peace you give me.
02I wish you one day you will be a CEO. You were born for it, Majidh.
03May your family dream come true, HR Manager and then far beyond.
04I wish Dubai treats you like the king you truly are, baby.
05May every good morning you send me come back to you a hundredfold.
06I wish us more long talks, rides and shared meals, always.
07May you know every single day how incredibly proud I am of you.
08I wish this distance between us shrinks faster than we both expect.
09May your smile, my favourite in the world, never ever fade.
10I wish you knew how rare you are, a man who loves without ego.
11May you achieve every dream you quietly let go for someone else.
12I wish your family sees your heart exactly the way I do, always.
13May Dubai open doors that bring you back to me sooner, kanmani.
14I wish you laughter every single day, the kind you always give me.
15May every late night call feel like home no matter the timezone.
16I wish I had said yes sooner. I am so grateful you waited for me.
17May 25 be the year everything you have worked for finally arrives.
18I wish you health, strength and safety, especially in Dubai, baby.
19May every child who looks up to you always find a reason to smile.
20I wish us a life where I never have to say I miss you again.
21May your trust in me always be rewarded. I will never hurt you again.
22I wish you peace the way you give me peace, completely and quietly.
23May every sacrifice you made become a blessing that finds its way back.
24I wish to grow old with you, Majidh. Every year, every birthday.
25Most of all I wish you know you are my whole world, forever.

HIS FAVOURITE SONG

🎵 காதல்... காதல்
காதல் ஒரு நாள் உ୧்களையும் வந்து னடையும்
னதை னல்லி னணைத்து கொள்ளுங்கள்
னன்பாக பார்த்து கொள்ளுங்கள்

காதல் தாங்கும் · காதல் தயங்கும்
காதல் சிரிக்கும் · காதல் இனிக்கும்
காதல் கவிதைகள் வரையும்

காதல் கலங்கும் · காதல் குழம்பும்
காதல் ஒரளவுக்கு புரியும்
காதல் விலகும் · காதல் பிரியும்

கதவுகளை மூடாமல் வழி னன்புங்கள்
காத்திருங்கள்...

ஒரு வோலை காதல் திரும்பினாள்
தூரத்தில் தயங்கி நின்றாள்
னருகில் செல்லுங்கள் · னன்புடன் போசுங்கள்
பொதும்... காதல் உ୧்கள் வசம்

மாற்றங்கள் வினா · மாற்றங்களோ விடை காதல்...
Majidh's heart, in words
"This song is us. You waited. I came back." ~ Ayshu
